distress_signals.title: Distress: Stranded Merchant
distress_signals.description: A civilian freighter broadcasts on all emergency bands. Their crystal drive is dead and life support is failing. You could help, ignore them, or... take what they have.

choices.text: Respond to the distress call and share spare crystals

outcome.description: You dock with the freighter and patch their crystal drive. The captain is grateful — word of your kindness will spread through merchant channels.

choices.text: Plot a new course. Not your problem.

outcome.description: You bank hard and leave the freighter behind. The distress signal fades into static. The multiverse is cruel — you're just not making it crueller.

choices.text: Disable their shields and take the cargo

outcome.description: You override their failing systems and strip the cargo hold clean. The crew watches helplessly as you fly away with everything they had.

distress_signals.title: Distress: Crippled Warship
distress_signals.description: A Canis League patrol vessel limps through the void, trailing debris. Their weapons are offline but their pride isn't. They're requesting assistance — from a cat pirate.

outcome.description: The League captain swallows his pride and accepts. As your crew patches their hull, you share a tense but civil drink on the bridge. Perhaps cats and dogs can coexist.
Business is business. The League captain agrees to your terms through gritted teeth. You leave richer, and they leave alive. Everyone wins — technically.
You fly past without a word. The League vessel grows smaller in your viewport until it's just another speck in the void.

distress_signals.title: Distress: Escape Pod
distress_signals.description: A lone escape pod tumbles through space, its beacon barely flickering. The occupant could be anyone — a refugee, a spy, or something worse.

outcome.description: The survivor turns out to be a fairy cartographer with star charts of uncharted crystal deposits. She offers to share the data in gratitude.

choices.text: Run a deep scan before approaching

outcome.description: Your scans reveal the pod is rigged with a proximity mine — a goblin trap. You detonate it safely from a distance and salvage the debris.
The pod drifts away. You'll never know what was inside. Some mysteries are better left unsolved.

distress_signals.title: Distress: Faint Signal
distress_signals.description: A weak, garbled transmission repeats on loop: coordinates, a plea for help, and then silence. It could be genuine — or it could be bait.

outcome.description: It was an ambush — but you were ready. Goblin scrappers decloak around you, but your prepped weapons send them scattering. They drop some loot in their retreat.
You fly straight into a goblin trap. They strip your shields before you can react, but you fight free — battered but alive, and a little wiser.

choices.text: Smells like a trap. Move on.

outcome.description: You trust your instincts and chart a wide course around the signal. Smart captains live longer.

distress_signals.title: Distress: Lion Tribute Ship
distress_signals.description: A Lion Dominion transport has suffered a crystal drive failure. They're carrying tribute crystals and won't beg for help — but they're drifting toward an asteroid field.

choices.text: Tow them to safety — no strings attached

outcome.description: The Lion captain is stunned by your generosity. A cat pirate with honour? He offers a formal commendation to the Dominion council.

choices.text: Offer a tow — for half their tribute

outcome.description: The Lion captain's mane bristles, but he agrees. Half their tribute fills your hold nicely, and they live to pay taxes another day.

choices.text: The Lions can sort themselves out

outcome.description: You watch the transport drift toward the asteroid field. Not your circus, not your... lions.
